verdict_reasoning: GRP78/BiP is canonically an ER lumen chaperone, but under ER stress, tumor transformation, and viral infection a documented pool relocalizes to the cell surface (csGRP78), where it serves as a receptor for multiple ligands and viruses and is the target of clinical-stage anti-csGRP78 antibodies and peptide-drug conjugates in oncology. Surface display is cell-state-induced (stress/transformation) rather than baseline.
